description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the default Docker image for Auto DevOps and runs in a Kubernetes‑enabled environment. Define a global before_script that declares helper functions (codeclimate, deploy, install_dependencies, setup_docker, setup_test_db, download_chart, ensure_namespace, check_kube_domain, build, install_tiller, create_secret, performance, persist_environment_url, delete). Add a canary job named ".canary" in the canary stage that runs only on the master branch when a Kubernetes cluster is active and must be triggered manually; its script executes the exact commands: check_kube_domain, install_dependencies, download_chart, ensure_namespace, install_tiller, create_secret, and deploy canary. Add a staging job named ".staging" in the staging stage that also runs only on master with an active Kubernetes cluster; its script runs: check_kube_domain, install_dependencies, download_chart, ensure_namespace, install_tiller, create_secret, and deploy (stable). Both jobs define an environment with appropriate URLs using $CI_PROJECT_PATH_SLUG and $AUTO_DEVOPS_DOMAIN variables.
